name: step-audio-skills
description: Combined audio skills repo containing StepFun TTS, StepFun ASR, StepFun audio chat, and stepaudio-asr-2p5, packaged in a NoizAI/skills-style layout for OpenClaw and similar environments.

scripts.test: npm run test:tts && npm run test:asr && npm run test:stepaudio-asr-2p5 && npm run test:audio-chat
